classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为电机正面外形和安装孔尺寸视图，包含可见尺寸标注'□57.15'、'□47.14±0.25'、'⌀38.1 +0/-0.05'、'4-⌀5 +0.3/-0'以及引线长度'320±20'，表达机械外形、孔径、孔距和线缆安装尺寸，不是针脚功能或性能曲线。

terminology_notes: Diameter symbol corrected from OCR misrecognition
translation_notes: 铭牌 visible in full context but outside this region

dimension_records.reason: Horizontal dimension at top of motor housing envelope, clearly marked with bilateral tolerance
Horizontal dimension at top edge, appears to define protrusion length
Small horizontal dimension indicating thickness of protruding feature
Left side mounting feature width with tight tolerance, critical for mounting interface
Vertical dimension on left side mounting feature with precision tolerance
Output shaft diameter with unilateral tolerance (h7 type fit). Critical rotating interface dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Left side mounting boss: 15±0.2 mm wide, 7.5±0.1 mm tall. Precision tolerances indicate critical mating surface.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft Φ8 +0/-0.013 mm (h7 type tolerance), indicating precision ground shaft for close-fit coupling or bearing.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Top protrusion 20.6±1 mm wide × 42.5 mm long, with 1.6 mm boss thickness. Motor housing side profile shown.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No electrical connector dimensions visible in this cropped region.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Overall motor body height not visible. Bottom shaft extension dimensions not shown. Mounting hole positions not dimensioned in this view. Full envelope requires front and top views.

unresolved_items.reason: Low confidence (0.72), isolated character with no clear dimensional context. May be OCR artifact from dimension line intersection or annotation symbol. Position overlaps with tolerance area but does not form coherent annotation.
Very low confidence (0.53), small fragment near dimension line. Likely structural line artifact.
Very low confidence (0.39), single dash character. Likely dimension line artifact, not actual text annotation.
Low confidence (0.88), isolated T near tolerance stack. No clear engineering meaning in this context, may be line intersection artifact.
Low confidence (0.63), isolated character. No clear dimensional or annotation context.
Isolated vertical line character, likely dimension line artifact.
Low confidence (0.67), fragment that appears to be partial overlap with ocr_022/018/015 shaft tolerance stack. Already incorporated into T006. Discarded as duplicate partial read.

Low confidence (0.73), overlaps spatially with shaft tolerance area but text does not match visible annotation. Candidate ocr_015 '∅13±1.013' appears to be misread combination. Visual inspection shows Φ8 +0/-0.013, not ∅13±1.013. Discarded as OCR misrecognition.
Confidence 0.84, but visually this area shows '+0' (ocr_018) and '-0.013' (ocr_015) as separate tolerance values. '+一' appears to be misread '+0'. Already incorporated into T006 via ocr_018.
High confidence (0.9999) but duplicate partial read of ocr_016 '7.5±0.1'. Spatially overlaps, represents same dimension without tolerance. Discarded in favor of complete annotation T005.
Fragment of complete dimension. Superseded by ocr_007 '15±0.2' which captures full annotation.
OCR misread of '0.2' tolerance value, showing leading colon instead of tolerance value. Superseded by ocr_007 complete '15±0.2'.
Fragment of tolerance, superseded by complete ocr_016 '7.5±0.1'.
Appears in candidate as part of '∅13±1.013', but visual inspection shows shaft is Φ8, not Φ13. OCR misrecognition. Actual shaft dimension captured in T006.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机'励磁顺序'接线/通电相序表，列出线色'黑 A+'、'绿 A-'、'红 B+'、'蓝 B-'与各步序正负极状态，并标明顺时针和逆时针方向，属于动力相线接线关系与极性定义。

classification.reason: 目标框内文字为'电气原理图'，位于完整图纸左下角电气连接示意区域的标题处；其下方可见绕组和A+、A-、B+、B-等电机引线标识，工程含义更接近动力/电源侧接线定义，因此在给定类别中选择最接近的动力连接器针脚定义。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
